title: [FIRRTL] Add lowering for firrtl.domain.subfield operations
body:
This commit adds support for lowering firrtl.domain.subfield operations
in the LowerDomains pass. Previously, domain subfield operations were
not being lowered, causing failures in the LowerClasses pass.

The lowering converts a firrtl.domain.subfield operation into a
firrtl.object.subfield operation that extracts the corresponding output
field from the domain's class representation. The conversion cast
wrapping the domain value is marked for deletion to ensure clean IR.

AI-assisted-by: Augment (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
